name: Feature or skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill, capability, runtime adapter, or doctrine change
labels: enhancement

**The problem**

<!-- What operating problem this solves. The kit is a standard, not a grab bag;
proposals that map to a real, repeatable failure mode land best. -->

**Proposed shape**

<!-- New skill (follows doctrine/conventions/skill-author-guide.md)? New
capability contract? A runtime adapter (must satisfy capabilities/adapter-contract.md)?
A doctrine change? -->

**What is enforced vs advisory**

<!-- If it touches enforcement, say plainly what would be a hard block vs a
convention. The kit does not ship aspirational enforcement unlabeled. -->

**Open a discussion first for anything larger than a fix.** See CONTRIBUTING.md.
